description_long: This is a tall, ornate floor lamp with a vintage design, featuring a dark metallic tripod base with elegantly curved legs and a central support column. The lamp has a prominent, bell-shaped glass or translucent shade at the top, capped with a small finial. A decorative adjustment knob and a foot pedal or lever are attached to the central column, suggesting mechanical or functional elements. The base and column are accented with metallic and possibly wooden details, giving it an antique, industrial appearance. The lamp's structure is open, with visible negative space between the legs and under the shade. Its overall aesthetic is reminiscent of early 20th-century or steampunk-inspired urban street lamps.
description: A tall, vintage-style floor lamp with a curved tripod base, ornate details, and a bell-shaped glass shade. Features metallic and possibly wooden accents with a decorative adjustment knob.
description_view_0: Front view shows the lamp's curved tripod legs, central column, and the bell-shaped shade with a finial on top.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the adjustment knob and foot pedal on the side, as well as the ornate structure of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open structure between the legs and the back of the central column, with less detail on the adjustment mechanism.
description_view_3: Side view displays the lamp's profile, emphasizing the curvature of the legs and the mechanical elements attached to the column.
